ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model for which the metric is recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., R², nRMSE) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who recorded the metric */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_metric_name FOREIGN KEY ("metric_name") REFERENCES metric_types ("metric_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the software model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project to which the model belongs */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "algorithm_type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the model */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the model details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team responsible for the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who initiated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the team belongs */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team manager */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* Number of members in the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, project manager, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team to which the user belongs */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_types" (
  "metric_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric type */,
  "metric_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric type */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Mathematical formula or definition of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric for this version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
